The '''Screaming Wookiee Squadron''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] unit.

==History==
It began its operational career as a training [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] under then-[[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Atton Repness]]; in this capacity it served as a "last resort" training outfit for [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] trainees that were on the verge of washing out of [[New Republic Starfighter Command/Legends|Starfighter Command]]. A [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] squadron, the Screaming [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] flew from the training [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Tedevium]]'' that was in turn part of [[Solo Fleet]].

The Screaming Wookiee Squadron was forced into early service under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Edor Crespin]] during the search for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], when the rogue [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stole the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] ''[[Razor's Kiss]]'' from the Imperial-occupied [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]].

Led by Crespin in his [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]], the Screaming Wookiees relieved [[Wraith Squadron]] from escorting [[Nova Squadron]]'s [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] during the attack on the stolen [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] and Zsinj's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]. The squadron did well enough during the mission to be made an official front line squadron.
